title: Body Measurement Tracker
desc: Track your body measurements over time including chest, waist, hips, arms, and thighs. Free online fitness progress tracker with history and health indicators.

title: Closet Organizer
desc: Organize your wardrobe digitally with our free Closet Organizer. Add items by category, color, and name, then generate random outfit suggestions. Perfect for capsule wardrobe planning and daily outfit inspiration.

title: Fabric Yardage Calculator
desc: Calculate fabric needed for sewing projects with our free online tool. Supports dresses, shirts, quilts, curtains and more. Get yardage in yards, meters and inches.

title: Hair Color Developer Calculator
desc: Calculate the perfect hair color to developer ratio for your desired lift level. Our free online tool recommends the correct developer volume and provides a precise mixing recipe for salon-quality results.

title: Hair Color Predictor
desc: Predict your hair dye results with our free online hair color calculator. Enter natural hair level, desired level, and hair condition to get developer volume, method, and processing time recommendations. Perfect for DIY hair coloring planning.

title: Hairstyle Length Calculator
desc: Find the perfect hairstyle length for your face shape and hair type. Calculate growth time to reach your desired length with adjustable growth rate and trim frequency. Free online hairstyle length calculator.
features: Styling tips for each face shape

title: Jewelry Size Calculator
desc: Find your perfect ring, bracelet, necklace, and bangle size with our free online jewelry size calculator. Convert between US, UK, EU, and Asian ring sizes easily. Accurate measurements for all jewelry types.

title: Laundry Symbol Guide
desc: Decode laundry care symbols with our free online guide. Quickly identify washing, bleaching, drying, ironing, and dry cleaning icons to properly care for your clothes and avoid fabric damage.

title: Makeup Shade Matcher
desc: Find your perfect foundation shade match across top beauty brands like MAC, Fenty, NARS, Maybelline, and L'Oréal. Our free online shade matcher converts your current shade to equivalent shades in other brands based on undertone and depth.

title: Nail Polish Mixer
desc: A free offline tool for nail polish mixer calculations. Works in your browser.
